description: A vertical graphic with a red-tinted photograph of an officer fastening handcuffs and a waist chain on a person standing beside a chair indoors; a radio is clipped to the officer's belt. White text across the lower half reads Screening. Vetting. Enforcement. USCIS ensures those who violate the law are identified and arrested.
notable_text: Screening. Vetting. Enforcement.; USCIS ensures those who violate the law are identified and arrested.
